text.title: Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM) Generation and Maintenance Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying requirements-traceability. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.fix: Lock to vocabulary; reject ad-hoc roles in edges.

antipattern.symptom: Trace from need only; no backward.
antipattern.fix: Run both directions; backward surfaces unjustified tests/code.
RTM update mandatory step in change-control; CI fails without it.

antipattern.symptom: Tests without needs left in coverage report.
antipattern.fix: Block release with orphans; require either link or removal.
